text: Bitcoin is a swarm of cyber hornets serving the goddess of wisdom, feeding on the fire of truth, exponentially growing ever smarter, faster, and stronger behind a wall of encrypted energy.

Bitcoin is a bank in cyberspace, run by incorruptible software, offering a global, affordable, simple, & secure savings account to billions of people that don’t have the option or desire to run their own hedge fund.
The halls of eternity echo with the cries of those who sold their Bitcoin.
There is no second best.
Bitcoin is the most efficient system in the history of mankind for channeling energy through time and space.
Bitcoin is the first time in the history of the human race that we managed to create a digital property, properly understood.
Bitcoin is the most difficult property that the human race possesses or has yet invented to confiscate.
Bitcoin is digital gold – harder, stronger, faster, and smarter than any money that has preceded it.
You may not care about Bitcoin, but Bitcoin cares about you.

The only use of time is how do I buy more Bitcoin? Take all your money to buy Bitcoin. Then take all your time to figure out how to buy more Bitcoin. And if you absolutely love the thing that you don’t want to sell it, go mortgage your house and buy Bitcoin with it.
My formula for success is rise early, work late, and buy Bitcoin.

Bitcoin links together 8 billion people, links together a hundred million companies, it synchronizes the world across political jurisdictions, and it returns rationality to the entire financial system, and it returns freedom and property rights to the entire human race.
Satoshi started a fire in cyberspace. While the fearful run from it and fools dance around it, the faithful feed the flame, and dream of a world bathed in the warm glow of cyberlight.
Bitcoin is what happens when we pool monetary energy on a software network. Few understand this.
Positive inflation drains the energy from your life. Negative interest is an attempt to stop the flow of time. Channel your energy into Bitcoin and move forward toward the future you deserve.

Bitcoin is the apex property of the human race. It's the first time we figured out how to create true property that you can take possession of with full custodial rights that's least likely to be impaired.
If you’re not going to commercialize it, then just educate people on what it is. Bitcoin is the most efficient use of energy in the world by far.
The best government would be the least, and the debate will be over that.

Bitcoin is magical and it is truly the innovation. It’s like a singularity because it represents the first time in the history of the human race that we managed to create a digital property, properly understood.
To engineer is divine. We’re either here to entertain ourselves or we’re here to create something that’s beautiful or something that’s functional.
The goal is you upgrade the world, right? You leave it a better place, but you get out of the way.

I think most people suffer because they don’t focus. There’s too much of everything. You got to figure out what you want to do, and then guard your time and then train your body, train your mind, and control who’s around you.

Bitcoin is digital energy. It is also digital property. It will last forever. It is programmable & moves at the speed of light. It is technology to provide property rights & economic empowerment to anyone with a mobile device.

Bitcoin has already won as Digital Capital. The next wave is Digital Credit, Digital Money, Digital Yield, and Bitcoin-backed capital markets.

Bitcoin is the dominant digital monetary network. The next billion members will pay trillions to join. You might want to join first.

Bitcoin is The Monetary Network. People with money will join. Then people with money will have to join.
Bitcoin is money. Everything else is credit.
Bitcoin is the solution. Everything else is noise.
We say Bitcoin is hope.
Bitcoin is an ark of encrypted energy to escape the currency flood.
Humans prosper by channeling energy. Money is the highest form of energy. Civilization forms on energy networks.

Bitcoin is the best crypto-asset. There is no second best crypto-asset.

Bitcoin is a stronger form of capital preservation than your house, bar of gold, a bunch of silver.
Keep the Bitcoin. There's no second best crypto asset. There's only one crypto asset that matters.

The reward for authenticity more than offsets the specificity with which you pursue your mission.
